0.text: Cavitary lesion with air-fluid level in the apical segment of the left upper lobe, measuring 5.8 cm

1.text: Diffuse interlobular septal thickening in both lungs

2.text: Bronchiectatic changes predominantly in the upper lobes

3.text: Patchy ground glass opacities in both lungs

4.text: Mosaic attenuation pattern in both lungs
